messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: needs-human becomes an on-disk field the swarm owns, folded into status.json — closing the isBlocked-always-false gap in the fleet console
What it solves: PARKED behind BL-437 (needs status.json to exist to fold into). Scenarios live in
specs/features/BL-438-needs-human-on-disk-signal.feature.draft until BL-437 lands and this is promoted.
How it works: When the coordinator is waiting on a human, an on-disk needs-human signal is written
